step3.ptxt: Using SST, connect terminals TC and CG of the DLC3.
Read the DTCs from the ABS warning light on the combination meter.

atten4.ptxt: If no code appears, inspect the TC and CG terminal circuit and the ABS warning light circuit.

entry.ptxt: ABS warning light circuit (Does not come on)

step3.ptxt: As an example, refer to the chart below for the blinking patterns of the normal system code and trouble codes 11 and 21.
The codes are explained in the code table (See page ).
After completing the check, disconnect terminals TC and CG of the DLC3, and turn off the display. If 2 or more DTCs are detected at the same time, the DTCs will be displayed in ascending order.
Using SST, connect terminals TC and CG of the DLC3.
Clear the DTCs stored in the ECU by depressing the brake pedal 8 times or more within 5 seconds.
Check that the warning light indicates the normal system code.
Remove the SST from the terminals of the DLC3.

atten4.ptxt: Clearing the DTCs cannot be performed by disconnecting the battery terminal or the ECU-IG fuse.

step3.ptxt: Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3.
Read the DTCs by following the prompts on the tester screen.
Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3.
Operate the intelligent tester to clear the codes.

atten4.ptxt: Refer to the intelligent tester operator's manual for further details.

step2.ptxt: Check that the ABS warning light goes off within approximately 3 seconds.
